summary: The main entrypoint assembles the CLI runtime by importing initialization, tools, plugins, bundled skills, MCP command registration, and then invoking `setup(...)` during action handling.
quotes_or_symbols: await setup(preSetupCwd, permissionMode, allowDangerouslySkipPermissions, worktreeEnabled, worktreeName, tmuxEnabled, sessionId ? validateUuid(sessionId) : undefined, worktreePRNumber, worktreeBaseRef, messagingSocketPath)
